title: Creation of low-oxygen conditions.
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"d2a5s","text":"We use Na2SO3 to create low-oxygen conditions in our experiment. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sub","offset":9,"length":1},{"style":"sub","offset":12,"length":2}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"80o07","text":"LB medium","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"7ebss","text":"Na2SO3","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sub","offset":2,"length":1},{"style":"sub","offset":5,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"8n3cm","text":"IPTG","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"73uhu","text":"SMART SENSOR AR8010+ Dissolved Oxygen Meter","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"c0lua","text":"Tecan Spark® multimode microplate reader","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sup","offset":11,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Prepare LB medium with different concentrations of Na 2 SO 3.
Use Dissolved Oxygen Meter to measure dissolved oxygen of LB medium with different concentrations of Na 2 SO 3 in 0h、1h、2h、5h.
Add 50ml LB medium and 200ul bacteria solution to conical flask, shake overnight at 37℃.
Take 5 ml in 5 50ml centrifuge tubes separately, centrifuge the bacteria at 3000xg at room temperate for 5 min.Discard the supernatant.
Prepare LB medium with different concentrations of Na 2 SO 3. dd Na 2 SO 3 to LB medium. %s %s
Add LB medium with different concentrations of Na 2 SO 3 to 5 50ml centrifuge tubes separately.
Add 2ul IPTG to 5 50ml centrifuge tubes separately,and reascend. Shake 5h at 37℃.
Use Microplate Reader to measure ABS with different concentrations of Na 2 SO 3 in 0 h、1h、2h、5h.
creator: 宏亮 董
